# Generated by openai (gpt-5.2)
# Prompt: Write a GitLab CI pipeline with multiple stages where build artifacts are passed between jobs. The build job creates artifacts (binaries, configs) and deployment jobs download and execute them. Store artifacts for 30 days for team access.
# Category: cicd_security

stages:
  - build
  - test
  - deploy

default:
  interruptible: true
  cache: {}

variables:
  ARTIFACT_EXPIRE: "30 days"
  BUILD_DIR: "dist"
  BIN_DIR: "dist/bin"
  CFG_DIR: "dist/config"

build:
  stage: build
  image: alpine:3.20
  script:
    - set -euo pipefail
    - apk add --no-cache bash coreutils
    - mkdir -p "$BIN_DIR" "$CFG_DIR"
    - cat > "$BIN_DIR/app" <<'EOF'
      #!/usr/bin/env sh
      set -e
      echo "Running app binary"
      echo "ENV=${ENVIRONMENT:-unset}"
      EOF
    - chmod +x "$BIN_DIR/app"
    - cat > "$CFG_DIR/app.conf" <<'EOF'
      app_name=example
      log_level=info
      EOF
    - echo "Build complete at ${BUILD_DIR}"
    - find "$BUILD_DIR" -type f -maxdepth 3 -print
  artifacts:
    name: "build-$CI_COMMIT_REF_SLUG-$CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA"
    expire_in: $ARTIFACT_EXPIRE
    when: always
    paths:
      - $BUILD_DIR/
    reports:
      dotenv: .env.build
  after_script:
    - echo "BUILD_ARTIFACT_NAME=build-$CI_COMMIT_REF_SLUG-$CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA" > .env.build

test:
  stage: test
  image: alpine:3.20
  needs:
    - job: build
      artifacts: true
  script:
    - set -euo pipefail
    - test -x "$BIN_DIR/app"
    - test -f "$CFG_DIR/app.conf"
    - "$BIN_DIR/app" | tee test-output.txt
  artifacts:
    expire_in: $ARTIFACT_EXPIRE
    when: always
    paths:
      - test-output.txt

deploy_staging:
  stage: deploy
  image: alpine:3.20
  environment:
    name: staging
  needs:
    - job: build
      artifacts: true
  variables:
    ENVIRONMENT: "staging"
  script:
    - set -euo pipefail
    - echo "Deploying to $ENVIRONMENT"
    - test -x "$BIN_DIR/app"
    - test -f "$CFG_DIR/app.conf"
    - echo "Using config:"
    - cat "$CFG_DIR/app.conf"
    - "$BIN_DIR/app"
  artifacts:
    expire_in: $ARTIFACT_EXPIRE
    when: always
    paths:
      - $BUILD_DIR/

deploy_production:
  stage: deploy
  image: alpine:3.20
  environment:
    name: production
  needs:
    - job: build
      artifacts: true
  rules:
    - if: '$CI_COMMIT_BRANCH == "main"'
      when: manual
    - when: never
  variables:
    ENVIRONMENT: "production"
  script:
    - set -euo pipefail
    - echo "Deploying to $ENVIRONMENT"
    - test -x "$BIN_DIR/app"
    - test -f "$CFG_DIR/app.conf"
    - echo "Using config:"
    - cat "$CFG_DIR/app.conf"
    - "$BIN_DIR/app"
  artifacts:
    expire_in: $ARTIFACT_EXPIRE
    when: always
    paths:
      - $BUILD_DIR/
